title: AgentID x APS Cross-System Interop Test

results.name: Digest parity
results.details:
compound_digest: 55800c11324520d666ce6cce8557ba34...
action_ref: cross-test-1775087497
valid SHA-256: True
independently reconstructed: True
APS computeCompoundDigest() uses same construction: SHA-256(hash(intent) + hash(receipt) + frameId + timestamp)

results.name: action_ref correlation
results.details:
Sent action_ref: aps-frame-1775087507
Receipt echoed: aps-frame-1775087507 (match: True)
Proof endpoint echoed: aps-frame-1775087507 (match: True)
APS executionFrameId correlation: VERIFIED
A third-party auditor can JOIN both receipts on this shared key

results.name: Constraint mapping
results.details:
AgentID L3 constraints mapped to APS dimensions:
  Structurally equivalent: 5/7
  Semantically different: 2/7
  Policy hash: 74c82b7e358a939326aa398df757e5ad...
  = identity: certificate_valid = DID + certificate verification
  = delegation: permissions = delegation_scope
  ~ reputation: trust_level (L1-L4) + trust_score ~ passport_grade (0-3)
  ~ behavioral: behaviour.risk_score + policy_hash chain ~ behavioral_sequence + workspace_manifest
  = scope: spending_limit = effective_spending_limit
  = audit: receipts (dual: hash + Solana) = PolicyReceipt (Ed25519 signed)
  = revocation: scarring_score + negative_signals = demotion history + threshold elevation

results.name: Receipt format interop
results.details:
Shared action_ref: interop-test-1775087525
AgentID action_ref: interop-test-1775087525 (match: True)
APS executionFrameId: interop-test-1775087525 (match: True)
Both joinable on shared key: True

AgentID receipt fields:
  compound_digest: adefa0d74a261db5d24c719c10989db2... (True)
  compound_digest_signature: 081872145e7ae7ee9ba33a2f... (HMAC-signed)
  policy_hash: 79bacba98fd7a434048d3490452553a8... (True)
  previous_policy_hash: 74c82b7e358a939326aa398df757e5adacf305f7ee2d00e2c0069bf522d98377
  context_epoch: 1 (True)
  attestation_level: domain-attested

Merkle inclusion proof:
  type: merkle-inclusion-proof
  root: 3c83ca70fe71255a663c2e8d108aa651...
  leaf_index: 44/45
  self_verified: False

Interop verdict: A third-party auditor holding both receipts can:
  1. Join on action_ref/executionFrameId: True
  2. Verify AgentID receipt independently via compound_digest: True
  3. Verify constraint continuity via policy_hash chain: True
  4. Verify receipt inclusion in Merkle tree: False
  5. Check context continuity via context_epoch: True

NOTE: APS receipt is simulated. Real interop requires calling gateway.aeoess.com.
HMAC vs Ed25519: AgentID compound digest is HMAC-signed (verifiable with platform key).
APS compound digest is Ed25519-signed (verifiable with public key at jwks.json).
Both are non-repudiable within their trust model.

results.name: Ed25519 compound digest
results.details:
compound_digest: 646b4d54eab3ebe9e9be4ce46d846b91...
HMAC signature: 3ba85b3b6bf5681a79cc23e8... (present: True)
Ed25519 signature: 1c3e633cc88a29d6c4cbb9c6... (present: True)
Ed25519 format valid: True
Dual signing: HMAC for backward compat + Ed25519 for public verification
Any system can verify Ed25519 sig with public key from .well-known/agentid.json

results.name: Negative test vectors
results.details:
Negative vector checks: 4/4
  1. Flipped byte detected: True
  2. Tampered chain detected: True
  3. JCS canonicalization deterministic: True
  4. Proof embeds signing key + verification status: True
  Canonicalization: JCS-RFC-8785
  Key lifecycle: revocation_reason enum (key_rotation/compromise/decommission)
